title: ProDec Advance 3' - 6' (0.9-1.8m) Saber Double Extending 50 Point Adjustable Extension Pole for Paint Roller Frames,Gives Extended Reach Compatible with Screw & Push Fit Frames,3 feet - 6 feet
features: Featuring ProDec's Easi-Glide technology with unique double extending action, the Saber extension pole makes it easier than ever to cover large areas rapidly and finish the job quickly

ULTRA-SMOOTH ACTION - unlike other extension poles that only extend one way, Saber features a double extending action that gives super quick, super slick adjustment and allows you to work in smaller spaces just as easily as large ones
ULTIMATE FLEXIBILITY - featuring over 50 individual locking points, you'll have no worries about adjusting to exactly the right length
RUGGED CONSTRUCTION - featuring an aluminium alloy body and mould cast zinc alloy tip, Saber can handle heavy duty use on both interior and exterior surfaces
SOFT GRIP HANDLE - using an extension pole can be hard work, especially when using it for long periods, and the comfortable soft grip handle reduces hand fatigue and prevents blisters
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Featuring Easi-Glide technology with unique double extending action, Saber makes it easy to cover large areas rapidly and finish the job quickly 50+ locking points ULTIMATE FLEXIBILITY - featuring over 50 individual locking points, you'll have no worries about adjusting to exactly the right length Reinforced zinc alloy tip Rugged mould cast construction for heavy duty use on both interior and exterior surfaces Textured soft grip handle Textured pattern for easy handling, with soft grip that reduces hand fatigue and prevents blisters

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Easi-Glide double extending action, Over 50 locking points, Soft grip handle
